name: Megatron -Cat-
description:
Pt 3 of the catfirmers thingy. But this time, instead of an experiment gone wrong, he had too much dark energon. Yes I’m aware that the pfp is bad even for my own drawing standards, but I genuinely gave up halfway through.

Not much motivation for this bot, leave suggestions on what you think the starter messages should be.
creator: Missing-ID
